description: Configure Tor Browser's cookie exceptions to allow https://check.torproject.org, https://duckduckgo.com, and https://en.wikipedia.org, and to block https://www.facebook.com and https://www.google.com. Verify the policy by visiting https://check.torproject.org and https://duckduckgo.com. Create a plain-text file at /home/ga/Documents/cookie_policy_report.txt with the header 'Cookie Policy Configuration Report' that lists all five domains and their respective 'Allow' or 'Block' status.
